name_cn:
Top-tier original with full packaging
Dior Groove♣️ 25 Bag 'Large White Embossed Quilted'
This Dior Groove 25 Bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from white calfskin with embossing, it features a large quilted effect houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key pouch is embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, unique and distinctive. The zipper lock can be opened with the attached key. The spacious compartment features an insert pocket and a zip pocket to hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily styling.
Zipper closure, with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key pouch embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with vintage gold-finish metal stars, with key
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal insert pocket
Model: 1365
Dimensions: 25 x 19 x 16 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 small bag, 1 wallet, 1 phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
